summary: Iteration 3 — Verified flowmeter categorisation, aggregation (hourly/daily/weekly/monthly/yearly), 24-hour buckets, ingest, reading edit + monotonicity validation, instrument edit/delete, certificates month field, Zone removal, new instrument detail routes, dashboard ground-water + STP sub-section, satellite map with layer toggle and pulsing markers. 70/70 backend pytest cases pass (19 new + 51 carried-forward). Frontend smoke-tested via Playwright; all flows visually confirmed.

issues: Labels are rendered in CSS uppercase (HOURLY/WEEKLY/MONTHLY/YEARLY). Cosmetic only — values are correct. Tests should match case-insensitively.
DialogContent missing aria-describedby (a11y warning in console). Not blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: EnhancedDashboard.jsx uses CSS uppercase for totaliser labels; recommend exposing original label text for screen readers / aria-label.
Certificates upload Dialog should include DialogDescription / aria-describedby to silence Radix accessibility warning.

api_flowmeter_mgmt monotonicity is enforced only on PUT (edit); ingest endpoint accepts any totaliser value — acceptable since live readings can legitimately exceed previous, but consider an optional guard for admin demo ingestion to prevent broken chronology.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_FM_<rand> with 3 chronological readings to exercise monotonicity. Also TEST_DWLR_<rand>. Class-scoped fixtures; orphan TEST category cleared post-run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 70 pytest cases (TestFlowmeterMgmt, TestInstrumentEditDelete, TestCertificateMonth added) green. Frontend confirmed visually via screenshot: Main Borewell FM_GW_001 shows 5.000 m³/hr + HOURLY 0KL / WEEKLY 25KL / MONTHLY 25KL / YEARLY 25KL; STP_IN 3.000 m³/hr; STP_OUT 2.700 m³/hr; Cumulative totalisers shown. Reports page lists 5 tabs (Flowmeter/DWLR/pH/TDS/Conductivity) with pencil/trash icons per row and monotonicity warning banner. Map renders Esri Satellite layer by default with layer control top-right. /dwlr /ph /tds /conductivity each load InstrumentDetail. Certificates upload dialog exposes Month (Jan–Dec, optional) + Year. Sidebar has exactly 7 items, no Zone. Be mindful: dashboard totaliser labels are uppercased via CSS — match case-insensitively in any future Playwright text assertions.
